name: Pettenthal
description: Most famous vineyard in Rheinhessen. Red slate soil produces powerful, mineral Rieslings with great aging potential.
historicalNotes: Considered Rheinhessen's finest site. St. Antony, Gunderloch, and Keller make benchmark examples.

name: Hipping
description: Large, prestigious site producing elegant, mineral Rieslings. Second-finest vineyard in Nierstein after Pettenthal.
historicalNotes: Historically considered one of Germany's greatest sites. Gunderloch, Keller, Heyl zu Herrnsheim excel.

name: Rothenberg
description: Small, steep red slate vineyard producing powerful, age-worthy Rieslings. One of Rheinhessen's steepest sites.
historicalNotes: Name means 'red mountain' referring to red slate. Gunderloch monopole produces legendary wines.

name: Brudersberg
description: Red slate terroir producing structured, mineral Rieslings with excellent depth.
historicalNotes: Name means 'Brother's Mountain,' named after monks who once cultivated the site.

name: Kirchspiel
description: Limestone terroir producing elegant, mineral Rieslings. Best site in southern Rheinhessen.
historicalNotes: Keller, Wittmann, and Wagner-Stempel make world-class examples. Recently elevated to top-tier status.

name: Morstein
description: Famous limestone site producing powerful, complex Rieslings. Most prestigious vineyard in Westhofen.
historicalNotes: Keller's monopole parcels command some of Germany's highest prices. Wittmann also makes iconic examples.

name: Ölberg
description: Mixed terroir producing elegant, complex Rieslings combining red slate and limestone characteristics.
historicalNotes: One of Nierstein's historic classified sites. St. Antony makes excellent examples.

name: Orbel
description: Red slate site producing rich, mineral Rieslings with good structure.
historicalNotes: Historic Nierstein site with multiple top producers including Heyl zu Herrnsheim.

name: Westhofener Steingrube
description: Limestone vineyard producing taut, mineral Rieslings. Fossil-rich soil adds complexity.
historicalNotes: Wittmann makes stellar examples from old vines.

name: Brunnenhäuschen
description: Limestone site producing elegant, refined Rieslings with excellent mineral expression.
historicalNotes: Name means 'little fountain house.' Keller and Wagner-Stempel own key parcels.
